title: diodia teres subsp. prostrata
intro: Diodia teres subsp. prostrata, also known as creeping buttonweed, is a low-growing, spreading plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Diodia teres subsp. prostrata include wound healing, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and it can be used as a topical cream or ointment, or consumed as a tea.
